generated_note: Directory combines the clinic-provided list with web-verified major payer/vendor records. Blank phone/fax fields mean not yet verified from an authoritative source and should be checked manually.

insurers.prior_auth_phone: Use the number on the member ID card for many precertification requests
insurers.notes: Aetna instructs providers to submit through EDI, the secure provider website, or by phone using the precertification number on the member ID card. Automated provider phone support is 1-888-632-3862 for many plans.
how_to_submit: Review the Aetna precertification lists first.
Submit electronically through the secure provider website/EDI when possible.
For plan-specific requests, use the precertification number on the member ID card.

Use the Carelon provider portal for the delegated program.

If faxing, use the appropriate Cigna form and fax 1-866-873-8279.

insurers.notes: TRICARE referral/authorization workflows are regional. TRICARE West uses Availity/TriWest referral management for referrals and pre-authorizations. Pharmacy prior auth forms are handled through Express Scripts and can be submitted by mail, phone, or fax depending on the form.
how_to_submit: Identify the correct TRICARE region and contractor first.
For TRICARE West, submit referrals and pre-authorizations through Availity/TriWest referral management.
Attach all supporting clinical documentation required by the contractor or pharmacy form.

insurers.notes: TriWest states that referrals and pre-authorizations can be submitted using the online referral management system on Availity. Some clinical programs list fax 1-877-989-0025 for documentation.
how_to_submit: Use Availity referral management for referral and authorization requests.
Attach supporting clinical documentation to the online request.
For program-specific documentation requests, follow the TriWest instructions and fax numbers shown in the applicable program guidance.

Use the portal submission tool for most UMR-administered plans.
If faxing a predetermination, use 877-442-1102 with the appropriate cover sheet.
